message:
refactor(tui): extract link detection and improve graph detail rendering

- Extract mouse link detection into reusable current_detail_link_row_area()
  method, shared across Main, Graph, and History views
- Refactor graph_detail_render_text() to insert external link at fixed
  position (line 4) with improved rendering logic
- Refactor detail_link_hit() to use the new extracted method
- Add tests for mouse clicks outside link areas (Main and History modes)
- Add detail_non_link_click_point() test helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
